subcodes.first_line: Thy name hath been mentioned before Our face in this Prison, and verses have been sent down for thee that all the kingdoms of the world cannot equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکر اسمک تلقاء الوجه فی هذا السجن و نزلت لک آیات لایعادلها ملک العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
